title: Capstone: Your Mental Health Literacy Toolkit
titleAr: الختام: مجموعة أدوات معرفتك بالصحة النفسية
learningObjective: After this exercise, the user will synthesize all mental health literacy skills learned over 14 days into a personal action plan.
learningObjectiveAr: بعد هذا التمرين، سيدمج المستخدم جميع مهارات محو الأمية في الصحة النفسية.

content.scenario:
Congratulations on completing 14 days of Mental Health Literacy!

Your Toolkit Summary:
✓ Affect Labeling (Day 1)
✓ Stress Response (Day 2)
✓ Anxiety Literacy (Day 3)
✓ Depression Literacy (Day 4)
✓ PERMA Wellbeing (Day 5)
✓ Stigma Types (Day 6)
✓ Contact & Empathy (Day 7)
✓ Myth-Busting (Day 8)
✓ Cultural Context (Day 9)
✓ Help-Seeking Pathway (Day 10)
✓ Safety Planning (Day 11)
✓ Sleep & Mental Health (Day 12)
✓ Social Media Literacy (Day 13)
✓ Synthesis (Day 14)

Key resources:
- Egypt Crisis Line: 16328
- Dar al-Ifta: 107
- WHO Mental Health: who.int/health-topics/mental-health
content.scenarioAr: مبروك على إكمال 14 يوماً من محو الأمية في الصحة النفسية!

task.instructions: Create your personal mental health action plan by completing each section.
task.instructionsAr: أنشئ خطة عملك الشخصية للصحة النفسية.

items.text: My self-care practice: [Choose one PERMA activity to practice weekly]
items.explanation: Excellent. Having a specific, planned self-care practice makes it more likely you'll follow through.

items.text: My help-seeking plan: [Identify one person you could talk to if struggling]
items.explanation: Having a named person (friend, family member, counselor) removes the barrier of 'who would I even tell?'

items.text: My crisis resources: 16328 (GSMHAT), 107 (Dar al-Ifta), university counseling
items.explanation: Saving crisis numbers NOW means you have them WHEN you need them. Don't wait until a crisis to search for help.

feedback.correct: Outstanding! You've completed the Mental Health Literacy program and created a personal action plan. Remember: mental health literacy is not a destination — it's a lifelong practice.
feedback.correctAr: ممتاز! لقد أكملت برنامج محو الأمية في الصحة النفسية.
feedback.incorrect: Complete each section. The action plan is personal — there are no wrong answers, only missing ones.

whatNotToDo: Don't think this is the end — mental health literacy is a lifelong practice
Don't forget the crisis resources — save them in your phone now
evidence: Jorm, A.F. (2012). Mental health literacy. American Psychologist + Kitchener & Jorm (2002). Mental health first aid.
safetyNote: If you or anyone you know needs support, call 16328 (GSMHAT crisis line).
com_b_mechanism: Full MHL synthesis builds integrated capability for ongoing mental health literacy
